feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: I fantasies about taking the lives of bad or evil people in order to make the wo…
entry.content: I fantasies about taking the lives of bad or evil people in order to make the world a better place, and to better the human species. However i don't trust myself to draw the lines between good and evil. I'm aware that there are good people like caring and passionate people, and I'm aware that there are bad people who do bad things to other humans to better themselves. But what about the grey area? my purpose is to become an EMT and help the lives of as many people as i can.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Vintage Story
entry.content: >1.23 update >the team has decided that Combat should be a focus for the next big update. Here's what we want to look into: Tighter, more visceral hit detection; More varied attack animations; Possibly rework of armor- and weapon tiers; A few more types of weapons; and more! The combat changes will be in good hands - we have Maltiez, author of the mod Combat Overhaul, on our team to advise us, we abducted the infamous SaltyWater to help us with animations and conveniently we just received new co

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: the daily chaotic
entry.content: I'm leaving [s4s] for good I'm sick and tired of everybody ABUSING me all the time on this board. No, I am not making this announcement to stir up any drama, or to get people to talk about me fondly after I am gone. This is not a cry for attention. This is not a threat. There are many things that this thread is not, in fact I cannot think of a single thing that it is. I am simply leaving, and I thought you all should know. Your fortune: ｷﾀ━━━━━━(ﾟ∀ﾟ)━━━━━━ !!!!

entry.content: The Biersack-Briggs Limit Test is a multistage esophageal capacity test that progressively gets more difficult as it continues. The 20 millimeter throat clogging test will begin in 30 seconds. Line up at the tailpipe. The slidding speed starts slowly, but gets faster each minute after you hear this signal. [BRAAAP] A single loaf should be ingested each time you hear this sound. [PRRRT] Remember to succ in a straight line, and gag as long as possible. The second time you fail to complete a log be

entry.title: /b/ Random: I'm not a moralfaggot but just for a second consider this. As great as porn is i…
entry.content: I'm not a moralfaggot but just for a second consider this. As great as porn is it's bad for your brain chemistry to keep indulging in it constantly. Take breaks, just a couple days a week at least. Do your brain a favor and normalize your dopamine receptors. I'm addicted af to porn and I'm sick of it so I'm trying to fix my head. I'm only posting this because maybe you are too, who knows? Have a good night, bitches.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Transporting a Vehicle
entry.content: What is a good transporter in the lower 48? Hard mode: must have first or second had experience. The guy I used once before is now $2.75 a mile, but I am seeing companies online such as Road Runner Auto Transport willing to do it for like 75 cents a mile.. I don't know if those first popping up on good result companies are legit though.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: UV light for detecting leaks?
entry.content: Many of the u/v lights sold in auto parts stores are cheap low end dreck that seem to suck. Ai seems to suggest that Convoy S12 UV is the best affordable option. What is a good U/V light for detecting oil or a/c leaks on a car?

entry.title: /int/ International: I don't like cities.
entry.content: I listened to everyone saying how great European cities are, and visited most of the major ones over a couple trips, and yeah they are pretty for sure. Then I moved to NYC, and like yeah it's pretty impressive, but honestly I think I only moved to cities because I'm told they are good. I like being in nature, and having more space, and not having to cram into a bus or subway to get somewhere, and not having to pay huge rents. I think small towns, or suburbs with access to a city are the best pla

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Autism and Religion Thread
entry.content: This is another autism love thread. Today, we are going to talk about religion and the supernatural. Questions: 1. Do you have any religious beliefs? If so, what are they? 2. Have you ever met any other autistic people? If so, what were their religious beliefs like? 3. What have your personal experiences with religion been like? My Answers: 1. I am an atheist, but I will admit that I treat autistic pride as a sort of secular pseudo-religion. I'm not really a participant in the greater "new athei

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Elden Ring DLC
entry.content: At what point in the game, from a story or roleplay perspective, does it make the most sense to start the DLC? Definitely after the Haligtree, but I'm not sure if it makes sense to do it before or after the Fire Giant and/or Farum Azula. What do you guys think?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: First look at Hulu’s Thriller Miniseries COUNT MY LIES
entry.content: >When compulsive liar Sloane (Shailene Woodley) fibs her way into a nanny position for the gorgeous and charismatic Violet (Lindsay Lohan) and her wealthy husband Jay (Kit Harington), it seems she has finally landed her dream job. But little does Sloane know, she has just entered a household brimming with secrets that are about to explode — with potentially catastrophic consequences for all. https://www.justjared.com/2026/05/1 8/lindsay-lohan-kit-harington-shail ene-woodley-continue-filming-new-

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Dell’s Macbook Neo Competitor costs €1049 in Europe
entry.content: >Dell XPS 13 DX13260, the lightweight and lower-cost XPS model announced at Computex, was quickly presented as Dell’s answer to Apple’s rumored MacBook Neo. >The system starts at $699 in the US, while eligible students can buy it for $599. That price created the impression that Dell had a real budget XPS option. European pricing tells a different story. Dell EU stores already lists the same XPS 13 from €1,049 including VAT, or €852.85 before VAT. >Dell currently shows two ready-made configuratio

entry.title: /g/ Technology: More than half of Monero's P2Pool got hijacked
entry.content: P2Pool is a decentralized mining pool for Monero. Block rewards are supposed to be split among participants based on how much they contributed. In the past few days: > Major vulnerability is discovered that enabled an attacker to hijack nodes into mining for them. > P2Pool devs release emergency update on June 13th > More than half of the network didn't update > Nearly half of P2Pool's hash rate is now going straight to the attacker's wallet > P2Pool devs are now launching a counterattack agains

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Miki Cortan
entry.content: Opinion about this guy and his skills ? Do you like this style of music ? This guy was a famous "virtuoso" of the Balkan Roma music scene. He improvised a lot in his music and created his own unique style of playing. There are a lot of crazy vids of him playing on youtube. He unfortunately died young a few years ago, so can't watch him live :( here are some vids of him playing: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6Em Gg8351xk https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vCI yRqDLFqk https://www.youtube.com/watch

entry.title: /g/ Technology: i hacked the office i work at.
entry.content: I am 20 and 3 months ago i landed this backend dev job at a local chinese company. They have departments of chinese and "my nationality"team. My department is just coverage for the chinese team because they are running gambling business targeting China. A month ago i scanned the network just for the fuck of it. I found out Ubiquit Unifi devices which are the network switches and the CCTVS for the office. After running some nmaps i found out that 192.168.0.8 is the main server which is running un

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I come to you all completely humbled. I have been slaughtered in pvp again and a…
entry.content: I come to you all completely humbled. I have been slaughtered in pvp again and again. I can blame lag all I want but deep down I know the truth. That my build is not genetically perfect. That no amount of oblivion damage can overcome a well balanced group. Worse even still is the same group can easily kill me to the point that they can completely ignore me and the battle turns out the same. Truly this has been a horrible experience to the point I am seriously considering switching to pve full ti

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8381 Off-Model Edition Previous Thread: >>83480376 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles
